channel.title: Maintenance on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes
channel.description: Recent content in Maintenance on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes

item.title: CloudNativePG 1.29.0 Released!
item.description: CloudNativePG 1.29 is now generally available! This major update revolutionizes PostgreSQL extension management via Image Catalogs and the new artifacts ecosystem. We also announce maintenance releases 1.28.2 and the final 1.27.4. Upgrade today for enhanced security, dynamic networking, and enterprise IAM integration.

item.title: CloudNativePG 1.28.0 Released!
item.description: CloudNativePG 1.28 is here! This stable release promotes Quorum-Based Failover and introduces Declarative Foreign Data Management for FDWs and foreign servers via the Database CRD. We also announce maintenance releases 1.27.2 and the final 1.26.3. Upgrade today for enhanced stability, security, and networking resilience.
